title: Fit test - Starting Fit Test with one Earbud disconnected [TO BE UPDATED]
scenario: Fit Test can be started with one earbud disconnected but disconnected earbud shows yellow icon and "Fail" tag with appropriate message
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a supported device (Osprey/Tern/Emu) is connected via Bluetooth, but with one earbud disconnected (e.g., remove one earbud from the charging case or power it off).
3. From the Home screen, navigate to Fit Test (located under Tutorials, Onboarding, or User Guides).
4. Tap to start the Fit Test.
expected: The Fit Test should start successfully. Results for the connected earbud should display properly. The disconnected earbud should always be marked with a yellow icon and a "Fail" tag, with the text "The {right/left} earbud was disconnected during the fit test" displayed.
